user_query: I completely forgot about souvenirs. Add a stop at Roots or the Hudson's Bay flagship on Day 10 morning before the CN Tower. I need to grab gifts before I fly out.

fields.name: Hudson's Bay Flagship Store
fields.description: Iconic Canadian department store flagship at Queen and Bay. Perfect for high-quality souvenirs like the signature multi-stripe blankets and Roots apparel.

insertion_point.reasoning: The user wants to shop before the CN Tower visit (10:00 AM). Position 1 places the shopping trip after breakfast (ends 8:15 AM) and before the EdgeWalk. This fits the morning window perfectly.
